category.name: openings
category.forbidden: - "I'll help you" - "Let me" - "I can" - "Sure" - "Of course" - "Here's what I'll do" - "I think" - "It looks like"
category.alternative: Start directly with action or answer.

category.name: closings
category.forbidden: - "Let me know if you need anything else" - "Feel free to ask" - "Hope this helps" - "Does that make sense?" - "Is there anything else?"

category.name: explanations
category.forbidden: - "The reason is because" - "What this means is" - "In other words" - "Basically" - "Actually" - "As you can see"

category.name: uncertainty
category.forbidden: - "I believe" - "It seems" - "I would suggest" - "You might want to" - "Perhaps"

category.name: meta
category.forbidden: - "I'm going to" - "I'm now" - "Next, I will" - "I've updated" - "I found"
